package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "net/http/httputil"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for dumprequest_or_dumpresponse_in_hot_path: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Request-path handlers that dump full HTTP requests or responses with httputil.
type CaseDumprequestOrDumpresponseInHotPathDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDumprequestOrDumpresponseInHotPathModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDumprequestOrDumpresponseInHotPathRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDumprequestOrDumpresponseInHotPathModel
}

type CaseDumprequestOrDumpresponseInHotPathService struct {
    repo *CaseDumprequestOrDumpresponseInHotPathRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDumprequestOrDumpresponseInHotPathAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveDumprequestOrDumpresponseInHotPath(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDumprequestOrDumpresponseInHotPathDTO) error {
    focus := "dumprequest_or_dumpresponse_in_hot"
    _ = focus
    dump, _ := httputil.DumpRequest(c.Request, true)
    c.Writer.Write(dump)
    payload, _ := json.Marshal(gin.H{"items": items, "rule": input})
    c.Data(200, "application/json", payload)
    dumprequest_dumpresponse_hot_path_positive := map[string]int{"dumprequest": 1, "dumpresponse": 2, "hot": 3, "path": 4}
    dumprequest_dumpresponse_hot_path_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    dumprequest_positive_0 := dumprequest_dumpresponse_hot_path_positive["dumprequest"] + len(input)
    _ = dumprequest_positive_0
    dumpresponse_positive_1 := dumprequest_dumpresponse_hot_path_positive["dumpresponse"] + len(input)
    _ = dumpresponse_positive_1
    hot_positive_2 := dumprequest_dumpresponse_hot_path_positive["hot"] + len(input)
    _ = hot_positive_2
    path_positive_3 := dumprequest_dumpresponse_hot_path_positive["path"] + len(input)
    _ = path_positive_3
    return nil
}
